name: Flannel Baby Blankets - Painterly Floral - 4pk - Cloud Island™: Cotton, 80 Thread Count, Classic Patterns
description:
Cover up your baby in a different style each day with the 4-Pack of Flannel Baby Blankets from Cloud Island™. This baby blanket set includes varying designs, each showcasing flowers for a delightful look. Made of 100% cotton fabric, this floral-print blanket set offers soft and breathable comfort. You can use the pieces as a receiving blanket, stroller cover, burp cloth, and more.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
